final_answer:
Deleted the old Ethereum validator lifecycle bridge path; I did not delete the asset bridge.

What changed:
- Removed old Ethereum validator join/update/exit/signer-change listener routing and processor tasks.
- Deleted `StakingProcessor` and its tests.
- Removed old decoder/mock/config/self-heal/docs/swagger surfaces for that path.
- Kept valid asset/checkpoint/state-sync/topup/slash/unjail bridge flows.

Why it matters: Ethereum staking events can no longer control Gold Chain validators. Validator lifecycle now stays native to Gold Chain and `GILT`.

Checks passed:
- `go test ./bridge/listener ./bridge/processor ./bridge/util ./helper ./helper/mocks ./x/stake/...`
- `go test ./...`
- `make build`
- Final gap scan found no old validator bridge task/API names.
